issue_summary: added support for secondary state in ODE step interpolators
javadoc_before:
/** Set the initial value of the jacobian matrix with respect to one parameter. *

The parameter must be {@link #selectParameters(String...) selected}.

* @param pName parameter name * @param dYdP initial jacobian matrix w.r.t. the parameter * @exception IllegalArgumentException if matrix dimensions are incorrect */
javadoc_after:
/** Set the initial value of a column of the Jacobian matrix with respect to one parameter. *

* If this method is not called for some parameter, the initial value of * the column of the Jacobian matrix with respect to this parameter is set to zero. *

* @param pName parameter name * @param dYdP initial Jacobian column vector with respect to the parameter * @exception MathIllegalArgumentException if a parameter is not supported */
